# Obsidian + AI = 王炸？

---

原文链接: [https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?\_\_biz=MzA4MzYyNDAzMQ==&mid=244892...](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzA4MzYyNDAzMQ==&mid=2448922734&idx=1&sn=f58ee616363b0ca06628c7e2e18ff1b1&chksm=8bf0915ebc8718485a38bf8c8111a18f3ef48b8324b18e6bab9309c64c38cdc74510beddd9a1&from_masonry=1&sessionid=1780976911&subscene=90&scene=132&ascene=0&devicetype=iOS26.5&version=18004a2a&nettype=WIFI&abtest_cookie=AAACAA==&lang=en&countrycode=CN&fontScale=115&exportkey=n_&pass_ticket=YISkvMUsc/LGy4/HD1nNL/EkqrtZvxowHffNUzF1I/XLStDIXA7coLvFL4STdITY&wx_header=3)

![](.evernote-content/DC61F901-9336-4EFE-A25A-C98E59466B65/C6901380-1ECE-4FC8-9C0A-A3C97CA8CDB0.jpg)![](.evernote-content/DC61F901-9336-4EFE-A25A-C98E59466B65/CBF55BDD-6C08-4A12-B48D-B1FBB1A8D032.jpg)![](.evernote-content/DC61F901-9336-4EFE-A25A-C98E59466B65/61413558-D842-4F3F-BA97-7C0055DDFFBC.jpg)![](.evernote-content/DC61F901-9336-4EFE-A25A-C98E59466B65/8BC8EF59-5505-4C63-92F5-A75CB43DB0AF.jpg)

如果你本来就在使用Obsidian，那 Karpathy 这套工作流真的很香！

OpenAI创始人Karpathy开源LLM Wiki工作流，将AI融入笔记系统，自动整理知识，建立关联，形成动态知识网络，提升效率，让笔记成为“第二大脑”。

另外Obsidian CLI和mcp搭配使用就更加如虎添翼了

![](.evernote-content/DC61F901-9336-4EFE-A25A-C98E59466B65/BC604ED2-D7C9-4581-B12B-0E986CAAEBC5.gif)

Close
